title: Pumping breast milk correctly
excerpt: When pumping helps, hygiene steps, frequency, and storage pointers — CDC and WHO aligned.
content:
## When pumping is useful

- Separating from baby, returning to work, engorgement relief, or low supply support under guidance.

## Procedure

- Wash hands; assemble clean pump parts.
- Warm compress or massage may help let-down.
- Match flange size to nipple; pain means poor fit.

## Frequency

If building supply, pump after feeds or on a schedule your lactation consultant sets. Do not over-pump without advice if supply is already ample.

## Notes

Label milk with date/time; refrigerate or freeze promptly. Replace worn valves as needed.
